name: Orange Julius Type Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a 48-ounce blender.
2. Adjust quantities for individual taste.
3. Blend on the highest speed for about 5 to 10 seconds.
4. Pour into a glass and serve.
To achieve a closer taste to the original, use carbonated water instead of regular tap water. You can also substitute strawberries or pineapple for the orange juice or mix flavors. For a single serving, use one-fourth of the ingredients and blend in a cup using a handheld blender. Ensure not to fill the cup too full to avoid spills.
